hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const cmd=JSON.parse(d).tool_input?.command||'';if(/db[:\s]push/.test(cmd))console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PostToolUse',additionalContext:'Reminder: run `npm run db:advisors` to check for new Supabase warnings.'}}))})"
